response: Apple’s iPhone 15 Pro arrives at a starting price of $999, featuring a 6.1-inch OLED display, the powerful A17 Pro chip, a 48 MP main camera, and a 3,274 mAh battery in a 187 g body. Available in 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB, and 1 TB storage options, it has already earned an impressive 4.6/5 rating.
